title: geocharis fusiformis var. fusiformis
intro: Geocharis fusiformis var. fusiformis, also known as African potato, is a plant species in the family Asparagaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its tubers, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Geocharis fusiformis var. fusiformis include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the tubers are often dried and crushed to make a powder, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or added to other remedies.
